description: JsonGenerator is a 'fat' interface/abstract class forcing implementations to support all write operations.
reasoning: The JsonGenerator class contains a massive number of methods covering diverse concerns: structural writing (arrays/objects), raw writing, binary writing, numeric writing, and object-specific writing (POJO/Tree). Implementations are forced to implement every single method, even if the underlying format does not support them (e.g., many methods throw UnsupportedOperationException), violating the Interface Segregation Principle.
